samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_16bit">
    <description>Implement an unsigned 16-bit multiplier using shift and accumulate operations.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Chip clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal. Defined as 0 for chip reset and 1 for reset signal inactive.</input>
        <input id="start">Chip enable signal to initiate the multiplication operation.</input>
        <input id="ain" width_description="[15:0]">Input signal representing the multiplicand (a).</input>
        <input id="bin" width_description="[15:0]">Input signal representing the multiplier (b).</input>
        <output id="yout" width_description="[31:0]">Product output signal.</output>
        <output id="done">Chip output flag signal. Defined as 1 indicates the completion of the multiplication operation.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="WIDTH">16</parameter>
        <parameter id="WIDTH">16</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="i">Shift count register.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="done_r">Multiplication completion flag register.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="done">Multiplication completion flag register.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="areg" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Multiplicand register.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="breg" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Multiplier register.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="yout_r" width_description="[2*WIDTH-1:0]">Product register.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <task id="default">
            <description>Implement the multiplication operation using shift and accumulate operations.</description>
            <trigger>
                <event>
                    <clock id="clk" />
                    <or>
                        <event>
                            <input id="rst_n" operator="!" />
                        </event>
                        <event>
                            <reg id="i" operator="<" compare_value="17" />
                        </event>
                    </or>
                </event>
            </trigger>
            <action>
                <assign>
                    <reg id="i" operator="<" compare_value="17" />
                    <if>
                        <event>
                            <rst_n operator="!" />
                        </event>
                        <then>
                            <assign>
                                <reg id="i" value="0" />
                            </assign>
                        </then>
                        <else>
                            <assign>
                                <i value="i + 1" />
                            </assign>
                        </else>
                    </if>
                </assign>
            </action>
        </task>
        <task id="default">
            <description>Generate the multiplication completion flag.</description>
            <trigger>
                <event>
                    <clock id="clk" />
                    <and>
                        <event>
                            <input id="rst_n" operator="!" />
                        </event>
                        <event>
                            <reg id="i" operator="<" compare_value="17" />
                        </event>
                    </and>
                </event>
            </trigger>
            <action>
                <assign>
                    <reg id="done_r" operator="<" compare_value="1" />
                    <if>
                        <event>
                            <reg id="i" operator="<" compare_value="17" />
                        </event>
                        <then>
                            <assign>
                                <done_r value="1" />
                            </assign>
                        </then>
                        <else>
                            <assign>
                                <done_r value="0" />
                            </assign>
                        </else>
                    </if>
                </assign>
            </action>
        </task>
        <task id="default">
            <description>Perform the shift and accumulate operation.</description>
            <trigger>
                <event>
                    <clock id="clk" />
                    <or>
                        <event>
                            <input id="rst_n" operator="!" />
                        </event>
                        <event>
                            <reg id="i" operator="<" compare_value="17" />
                        </event>
                    </or>
                </event>
            </trigger>
            <action>
                <assign>
                    <reg id="done_r" operator="<" compare_value="1" />
                    <if>
                        <event>
                            <reg id="i" operator="<" compare_value="17" />
                        </event>
                        <then>
                            <assign>
                                <reg id="done_r" value="1" />
                            </assign>
                        </then>
                        <else>
                            <assign>
                                <done_r value="0" />
                            </assign>
                        </else>
                    </if>
                </assign>
            </action>
            <action>
                <assign>
                    <reg id="done_r" operator="<" compare_value="1" />
                    <if>
                        <event>
                            <reg id="i" operator="<" compare_value="17" />
                        </event>
                        <then>
                            <assign>
                                <reg id="done_r" value="1" />
                            </assign>
                        </then>
                        <else>
                            <assign>
                                <done_r value="0" />
                            </assign>
                        </else>
                    </if>
                </assign>
            </action>
            <action>
                <assign>
                    <reg id="areg" operator="<" compare_value="1" />
                    <if>
                        <event>
                            <reg id="i" operator="<" compare_value="17" />
                        </event>
                        <then>
                            <assign>
                                <reg id="areg" value="ain" />
                            </assign>
                        </then>
                        <else>
                            <assign>
                                <areg value="0" />
                            </assign>
                        </else>
                    </if>
                </assign>
            </action>
            <action>
                <assign>
                    <reg id="breg" operator="<" compare_value="1" />
                    <if>
                        <event>
                            <reg id="i" operator="<" compare_value="17" />
                        </event>
                        <then>
                            <assign>
                                <reg id="breg" value="bin" />
                            </assign>
                        </then>
                        <else>
                            <assign>
                                <breg value="0" />
                            </assign>
                        </else>
                    </if>
                </assign>
            </action>
            <action>
                <assign>
                    <reg id="yout_r" operator="<" compare_value="1" />
                    <if>
                        <event>
                            <reg id="i" operator="<" compare_value="17" />
                        </event>
                        <then>
                            <assign>
                                <reg id="yout_r" value="0" />
                            </assign>
                        </then>
                        <else>
                            <assign>
                                <if>
                                    <event>
                                        <input id="start" operator="!" />
                                    </event>
                                    <then>
                                        <assign>
                                            <reg id="yout_r" value="0" />
                                        </assign>
                                    </then>
                                    <else>
                                        <assign>
                                            <if>
                                                <input id="i" operator="<" compare_value="17" />
                                                <then>
                                                    <assign>
                                                        <reg id="yout_r" value="yout_r + (breg << (i - 1) < 31)" />
                                                    </assign>
                                                </then>
                                                <else>
                                                    <assign>
                                                        <reg id="yout_r" value="yout_r" />
                                                    </assign>
                                                </else>
                                            </if>
                                        </assign>
                                    </else>
                                </if>
                            </assign>
                        </else>
                    </if>
                </assign>
            </action>
        </task>
    </implementation>
</module>

   27 |             a <= ain;
      |               ^~

                                   : ... In instance multi_16bit
   28 |             b <= bin;
      |               ^~
%Warning-WIDTH: multi_16bit.v:32:41: Operator SHIFTL expects 32 bits on the LHS, but LHS's VARREF 'b' generates 16 bits.
                                   : ... In instance multi_16bit
   32 |                 product <= product + (b << (count-1));
      |                                         ^~

                                   : ... In instance multi_16bit
   46 | assign yout = product;
      |             ^
